theme_and_context.design_archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast with Brutalist Dark Mode adjustments (Archetype 4 Variant)

typography.strategy: High-contrast geometric sans + technical monospace for data density and developer aesthetic.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (High Density Mode B) for dashboards. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict left-alignment for all data, tables, and forms. Center alignment ONLY for login box.

surface_strategies.cards: Borderless or 1px solid #27272A borders. Strictly NO border-radius (rounded-none). Background #09090B.
surface_strategies.headers: Solid black background #000000 with 1px bottom border #27272A. No glassmorphism (keep it terminal-sharp).

buttons.primary: rounded-none bg-[#00E559] text-black font-semibold font-mono uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#00C24B] transition-transform active:scale-95 px-6 py-3
buttons.secondary: rounded-none bg-transparent border border-[#27272A] text-white hover:border-[#00E559] hover:text-[#00E559] transition-colors px-6 py-3

inputs.default: rounded-none bg-[#09090B] border border-[#27272A] text-white focus:border-[#00E559] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E559] transition-all px-4 py-2 font-mono text-sm

tables.style: Dense, compact rows. 1px border-b border-[#27272A]. Headers in font-mono text-xs uppercase text-zinc-500. Row hover bg-[#18181B].

status_pips.connected: w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-[#00E559] shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,229,89,0.5)] inline-block
status_pips.disconnected: w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-[#FF3333] shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,51,51,0.5)] inline-block

components.shadcn_overrides: Remove all 'rounded-md', 'rounded-lg', etc. Force 'rounded-none'. Remove soft drop shadows, replace with hard offset shadows if elevated.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Snappy and mechanical. Use transition-colors duration-150 ease-linear. No slow/bouncy easings.
motion_and_interactions.loaders: ASCII spinners or stark monospace text loaders (e.g., 'CONNECTING... [|||||   ]').

assets_and_icons.library: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) with weight='regular' or 'bold'. No duotone for brutalist.
assets_and_icons.usage: Use icons sparingly. Rely more on typography, color coding, and spacing.

admin_avatar.description: Professional developer avatar for admin profile picture.
admin_avatar.placement: Top right header or bottom of sidebar.

login_background.description: Abstract green digital pattern with vertical lines.
login_background.placement: Left half of the login screen or subtle background overlay with very low opacity (10%).

layout_shell.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar (w-64). Solid black. Mono-font navigation links with hover states.
layout_shell.header: Top bar for breadcrumbs, connection status global indicator, and admin profile.

pages_and_views.dashboard_home: 4-column metric cards at top (JetBrains Mono for numbers). Active rules and recent webhooks in a 2-column grid below.
pages_and_views.whatsapp_sessions: Grid of session cards. If no session, show a brutalist dashed-border empty state with 'CREATE NEW SESSION' CTA.
pages_and_views.send_playground: Two-pane view. Left: Form inputs. Right: Terminal-like black box for JSON response/logs.
pages_and_views.message_logs: Full-width data table. Mono font for timestamps and JIDs. Red/Green text for incoming/outgoing arrows.
pages_and_views.api_docs: Embedded swagger or custom clean markdown-style typography layout with sticky right sidebar for endpoints.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: DO NOT use generic rounded corners. This is a retro-brutalist tech dashboard. Everything must be sharp (rounded-none).
Use JetBrains Mono for ANY data points, numbers, IDs, API keys, or logs. Use IBM Plex Sans for general reading.
DO NOT use generic blue or purple gradients. Use True Black (#000000) for the page background and Terminal Green (#00E559) for highlights.
Apply hard drop shadows for hover states on cards and buttons: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#00E559].
Ensure high contrast. Text on black must be crisp white (#FFFFFF) or light zinc (#A1A1AA).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes for testing.
Use Phosphor Icons instead of Lucide to match the sharp technical aesthetic.
Shadcn components MUST be customized in tailwind classes to remove radius and soft shadows.
For the API keys section, blur the key by default and show it only when a 'Reveal' icon is clicked, using monospace font.
Toasts must use Sonner with dark mode forced and a sharp 0-radius border.
